title: Hyperliquid Mobile with Dexari, Ex-Binance US
summary_title: Ex-Binance founders build Hyperliquid's first native mobile app with account abstraction
summary_description: Dexari launched iOS and Android apps abstracting chain complexity, enabling seamless USDC deposits from Ethereum, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism—and soon Bitcoin and Solana.

key_moments.label: Introducing Dexari: mobile solution filling Hyperliquid gap
Chuck and Zach left Binance US to build decentralized exchange
Ex-Binance perspective on centralized exchanges versus Hyperliquid threat
Native iOS and Android apps launching for frictionless mobile trading
Account abstraction: one USDC balance across all chains
Android app just released; iOS TestFlight live with invite code
Roadmap includes vaults, staking, on-ramps, off-ramps, card integration
Points program announced: all current activity counts retroactively

pull_quote: Centralized exchanges are inarguably some of the better user experiences built in crypto so far, and Hyperliquid is the first time I've seen a product that rivals them in performance, liquidity, and user experience.
